title: Create Propulsed
description: A mod adds rocket engines to Create: Simulated
body:
# Create Propulsed

![Icon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zeutd/Create-Propulsed/refs/heads/master/icon.png)

This mod adds rocket engines to Create: Simulated

## Contents
Rocket engine.

## Contents planned
Large multiblock rocket engine 

Ion thruster

Jet engine

## Discalmer
This mod did NOT contain any contents related to space. Only rocket engines.
